observations.cue: 马头墙 — stepped gable perimeter wall rising above the roof line in 2-3 stages
observations.note: Per attribution.md the source is a third-party datapack; observation is architectural language only, not a copy of geometry.

observations.cue: white wall + dark tile two-tone (白墙黑瓦)
observations.note: High-contrast palette typical of Huizhou vernacular; useful for material palette calibration.

observations.cue: closed, inward-facing street facade with few or no windows
observations.note: The street side reads as a high solid wall; the only opening is the entry door.

observations.cue: 堂—井—堂 vertical hall sequence with small sky-wells (天井) between halls
observations.note: Consistent with the form captured in the huipai-tianjing-mansion spec.

observations.cue: inward-pitched roofs collecting rainwater toward the 天井 (四水归堂)
observations.note: Roofwater collection is a load-bearing form cue, not just decoration.

observations.cue: overall silhouette is closed / vertical / fortress-like, contrasted with Jiangnan open / horizontal
observations.note: This contrast is the load-bearing aesthetic differentiator vs chinese_mansion.

direct_component.cue: full candidate_003 structure as a bounded NBT prefab
direct_component.rationale: REJECTED as a direct component. The candidate is a third-party datapack structure (local_research only); the project does not redistribute third-party .nbt. A direct prefab route would require a separate clean-room rebuild and license review, neither of which is in scope for this decomposition.
direct_component.downstream_route: no_direct_component: this cue is intentionally not routed. A future rebuild-huipai-mansion change would author original .nbt assets instead.
direct_component.review_needed: Owner verdict on whether any part of the reference may ever be treated as a direct component. Default: no.

atomic_component.cue: 马头墙 stepped gable motif (2-3 stage阶梯式封火墙)
atomic_component.rationale: The stepped gable is a small reusable perimeter-wall operation that can be authored as an original form in the project's vocabulary, not a copy of the source geometry. It is the strongest atomic-component candidate.
atomic_component.downstream_route: form-registry + chinese-vernacular-roof-vocabulary: add a stepped-gable motif operation; reuse for any future Huizhou-style perimeter wall.
atomic_component.review_needed: Visual review of step count, stage height, and ridge cap form before the motif enters the form registry.

atomic_component.cue: single entry door + high solid side wall (closed-facade primitive)
atomic_component.rationale: A bounded wall-with-entry operation that captures the closed-street-facade behavior without copying the source building.
atomic_component.downstream_route: form-registry: candidate 'closed-facade-with-entry' motif for reuse across Huizhou and any future inward-facing compound family.
atomic_component.review_needed: Proportion review: wall height vs door height, door placement relative to compound axis.

generative_grammar.cue: 堂—井—堂 vertical sequence (门堂 → 天井一 → 享堂 → 天井二 → 寝堂)
generative_grammar.rationale: This is the load-bearing plan rule: a vertical sequence of halls separated by small sky-wells, NOT a horizontal yard sequence. It generalizes into a planner/layout rule that any future Huizhou compound would instantiate.
generative_grammar.downstream_route: future rebuild-huipai-mansion OpenSpec change + compound planner; see huipai-tianjing-mansion spec (FUTURE) for the canonical 门堂→天井一→享堂→天井二→寝堂 sequence.
generative_grammar.review_needed: Layout validator + visual acceptance of the generated 堂—井 rhythm before any Huizhou compound family ships.

generative_grammar.cue: 四水归堂 inward roof-pitch rule (roofs pitch toward the 天井)
generative_grammar.rationale: A roof-orientation grammar rule: the planner pitches 堂 and 廊庑 roofs inward toward the enclosed sky-well, not outward. This rule is generative; it does not copy any specific source roof.
generative_grammar.downstream_route: chinese-mansion-compound / future rebuild-huipai-mansion: roof-pitch planner rule + courtyard-ground-layer interaction for 天井 drain.
generative_grammar.review_needed: Visual review that the generated roofwater actually drains into the 天井 collection point, not away from it.

generative_grammar.cue: closed-inward-vertical massing envelope (no 花园 parcel; the 天井 IS the outdoor space)
generative_grammar.rationale: A massing/proportion rule that explicitly contrasts with the Jiangnan open-horizontal envelope. Drives how the planner allocates parcel types.
generative_grammar.downstream_route: cultivation-massing-grammar / future rebuild-huipai-mansion: enforce has_garden:false default and vertical stacking.
generative_grammar.review_needed: Rubric review that the generated massing reads as closed/vertical/fortress-like, not open/bright/water-garden-like.

calibration_only.cue: white wall + dark tile two-tone (白墙黑瓦) palette
calibration_only.visual_question: Does the generated Huizhou compound read as high-contrast white-wall / dark-tile, or does it drift toward the warmer Jiangnan palette?
calibration_only.review_needed: Palette calibration against genops/style_bibles/chinese_mansion.yaml once any Huizhou asset exists.

calibration_only.visual_question: At the same lot size, does the generated Huizhou silhouette read as taller-and-narrower than the Jiangnan equivalent?
calibration_only.review_needed: Silhouette calibration in genops/rubrics/mansion.rubric.yaml; no asset or rule output, only a visual judgment reference.
